title: vaccinium otophyllum
intro: Vaccinium otophyllum, also known as the Red Mountain Cranberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium otophyllum include reducing the risk of urinary tract infections and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
